description: Return a list of all Custom Field Metadata associated with the Current Company.

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the company. You must supply either a company_id or project_id.

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the project. You must supply either a company_id or project_id.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description:
The extended view provides what is shown below.
The default view returns the same as the extended view but excludes the attributes company_id, host_type, source_type, source_id, label, data_type.
T...

parameters.name: filters[field_set_type][]
parameters.description: Return a list of all Custom Field Metadata associated with the Current Company and source_type provided.

parameters.name: filters[field_set_id][]
parameters.description: Return a list of all Custom Field Metadata associated with the Current Company and source_id provided.

parameters.name: filters[custom_field_definitions_id]
parameters.description: Return a list of all Custom Field Metadata associated with the Current Company and custom_field_definition_id provided.

position.description: Position is sorted ascending, lowest position is visually the top left of the page on a grid basis (used in conjunction with column_width property to calculate row and column properties).

required.description: Whether or not the Custom Field Metadatum is required

visible.description: Whether or not the Custom Field Metadatum is visible

variant.description: The variant type of the Custom Field

default_value.description: The default value of the Custom Field

row.description: Row the Field is position on the Form

column.description: Column the Field is position on the Form

column_width.description: How many columns the field spans on the Form

custom_fields_section_id.description: The display section of the Custom Field, if null it is the general section, visually in the top level section typically called "General Information".
